name: Noir Heritage
description: A statement of restraint in polished black and gold. The Noir Heritage is crafted for moments that deserve to last.

name: Royal Aurum
description: Radiant and refined. Royal Aurum blends sleek details with a luminous gold bezel for an elevated everyday feel.

name: Obsidian Edge
description: Precision and poise in a bold black case. Obsidian Edge is the athletic luxury piece with sharp lines.

name: Ivory Classique
description: Soft ivory dial and tonal elegance. Ivory Classique is understated luxury with a timeless finish.

name: Antique Sabre
description: A vintage-inspired design with modern movement. Antique Sabre is for collectors who cherish detail.

name: Midnight Chronos
description: Dynamic, dark, and dependable. Midnight Chronos brings precision to both city life and midnight affairs.
